title: Bionano Genomics Inc (BNGO) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strategic Shifts Amid Revenue Challenges
text: Bionano Genomics reported Q3 2024 results showing revenue decline but operational improvements. Q3 revenue was $6.1 million, down 35% year-over-year. Installed base reached 368 OGM systems, up 22% from prior year. Flow cell sales increased 27% to 7,835 units, signaling strong utilization improvements. The company executed a strategic shift from broad customer acquisition to focusing on approximately 150 routine use customers. Non-GAAP operating expenses fell 49% to $16.1 million. Operating cash burn was approximately $14 million, down 46% year-over-year. The company expects full-year 2024 revenue of $28-30 million with Q4 guidance of $6-7 million. New CPT code 81195 for hematologic malignancies was expected to enable billing starting January 2025. Stratys system showed strong commercial traction with early adopters expressing high demand. Bionano's strategic focus centers on maximizing revenue and profitability from existing 118 routine use customers, each generating about $85,000-$90,000 in annual consumables revenue.
